Note: Fishhawk is in pre-alpha. The v0 abstractions are still being fixed in place. Feature PRs from outside contributors are not being accepted yet, but design feedback on the spec is welcome and useful. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
